data.title: The Top 10% Are Fueling The Climate Crisis: Wealthiest People Linked To Most Extreme Weather Events, Study Finds
data.description: New study shows the wealthiest 10% contribute most to climate change, leading to extreme events affecting millions.

data.title: Why AppLovin Shares Are Trading Higher By 15%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
Trump Tariffs To Cost Toyota $1.3 Billion As Japanese Automaker Warns Forecasting Is 'Very Difficult' Amid Uncertainty
data.description: Toyota Motor Corp. has projected a one-fifth decline in operating profit for the fiscal year ending March 2026, citing significant headwinds from President Trump's tariff policies and a stronger yen just one year after posting record earnings.

data.title: S&P 500 Chart Indicates Adding 'Long' Positions As Expert Says 'Market Has Found Its Balance'
data.description: Jurrien Timmer suggests that a simple look at the S&P 500 chart offers a compelling answer for those pondering their next move: "long."

data.title: Elon Musk's Cybercab Ambitions Face Latest Snag: Tesla's 'Robotaxi' Trademark Filing Refused
data.description: USPTO refuses Tesla's attempt to trademark Robotaxi as it is Merely Descriptive, says Tesla can provide evidence to support its claim.
